query: SELECT vs.id, vs.item_key, vs.display_name, ic.category AS catalog_category, ec.equip_id, ec.slot AS equip_slot FROM game_virtual_shop vs LEFT JOIN game_item_catalog ic ON vs.item_key = ic.item_id LEFT JOIN game_equipment_catalog ec ON vs.item_key = ec.equip_id WHERE vs.item_key IN ('iron_sword', 'E_M001', 'I_M001', 'I_SCR_WPN') LIMIT 10;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user PS8xt1zjvuRpYHF.3bd331015af6 --database MLF7bLVZzzxdGTPVXTct3c --execute SELECT vs.id, vs.item_key, vs.display_name, ic.category AS catalog_category, ec.equip_id, ec.slot AS equip_slot FROM game_virtual_shop vs LEFT JOIN game_item_catalog ic ON vs.item_key = ic.item_id LEFT JOIN game_equipment_catalog ec ON vs.item_key = ec.equip_id WHERE vs.item_key IN ('iron_sword', 'E_M001', 'I_M001', 'I_SCR_WPN') LIMIT 10;
